ATTY. GARY R. BASHAM OF THE BASHAM PARKER LLP, TEL. NO. (916) 925-5850 EXT. 40 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS ADAMS AND ASSOCIATES, INCORPORATED, ANNY FONG AND THEO FOREMAN'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And For Stay Of All Proceedings IS GRANTED.
